name: look_through_exposure
description: Decomposes ETFs and funds into their true underlying holdings, aggregates real exposure per issuer/sector/region across the whole portfolio, and flags hidden concentration and correlated clusters. Returns a diversification sub-score (0-100).

holdings.description: Portfolio positions. ETFs/funds are decomposed via their constituents.

weight.description: Portfolio weight as a fraction 0..1. Either weight or market_value is required.

market_value.description: Position market value in account currency (alternative to weight).

constituents.description: Optional known constituents for an ETF/fund. If omitted, the tool uses its built-in reference map when available.

weight.description: Constituent weight within the fund, fraction 0..1.

concentration_threshold.description: True single-issuer weight above which a concentration flag is raised (fraction 0..1, default 0.10).
